tEn: Improved Baselines with Visual Instruction Tuning
tZh: 通过视觉指令调优改进基线模型
sEn: Simple modifications to LLaVA, including using CLIP-ViT-L-336px with MLP projection and adding academic VQA data, achieve state-of-the-art across 11 benchmarks with only 1.2M public data and ~1 day training on 8 A100s.
sZh: 对LLaVA进行简单修改，包括使用带MLP投影的CLIP-ViT-L-336px并添加学术VQA数据，仅用120万公开数据和8块A100训练约1天，就在11个基准上达到最先进水平。
absEn: Large multimodal models (LMM) have recently shown encouraging progress with visual instruction tuning. In this note, we show that the fully-connected vision-language cross-modal connector in LLaVA is surprisingly powerful and data-efficient. With simple modifications to LLaVA, namely, using CLIP-ViT-L-336px with an MLP projection and adding academic-task-oriented VQA data with simple response formatting prompts, we establish stronger baselines that achieve state-of-the-art across 11 benchmarks. Our final 13B checkpoint uses merely 1.2M publicly available data, and finishes full training in ~1 day on a single 8-A100 node. We hope this can make state-of-the-art LMM research more accessible. Code and model will be publicly available.
absZh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）近期通过视觉指令调优取得了令人鼓舞的进展。本文表明，LLaVA中的全连接视觉-语言跨模态连接器出人意料地强大且数据高效。通过对LLaVA进行简单修改，即使用带MLP投影的CLIP-ViT-L-336px，并添加带有简单响应格式提示的学术任务导向VQA数据，我们建立了更强的基线，在11个基准上达到了最先进水平。我们最终的13B检查点仅使用了120万公开数据，并在单个8-A100节点上约1天内完成全部训练。我们希望这能使最先进的LMM研究更加普及。代码和模型将公开提供。

contrib.en: Shows that LLaVA's fully-connected vision-language connector is powerful and data-efficient.
contrib.zh: 展示了LLaVA的全连接视觉-语言连接器强大且数据高效。

contrib.en: Introduces simple modifications: MLP projection and academic VQA data with response formatting prompts.
contrib.zh: 引入简单改进：MLP投影和带响应格式提示的学术VQA数据。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art across 11 benchmarks with only 1.2M public data and ~1 day training on 8 A100s.
contrib.zh: 仅用120万公开数据和8块A100约1天训练，在11个基准上达到最先进水平。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that visual instruction tuning is more important than large-scale pre-training for LMMs.
contrib.zh: 证明视觉指令微调比大规模预训练对LMM更重要。

contrib.en: Proposes a single response formatting prompt to balance short and long-form answers without extra data processing.
contrib.zh: 提出单一响应格式提示，平衡短和长形式答案，无需额外数据处理。

contrib.en: Provides fully reproducible and affordable baselines for future LMM research.
contrib.zh: 为未来LMM研究提供完全可复现且负担得起的基线。

limits.en: Uses full image patches, prolonging training iterations compared to visual resamplers.
limits.zh: 使用完整图像块，相比视觉重采样器延长训练迭代。

limits.en: Cannot process multiple images due to lack of data and context length limits.
limits.zh: 由于缺乏数据和上下文长度限制，无法处理多张图像。

limits.en: Problem-solving capabilities limited in certain domains despite complex instruction following.
limits.zh: 尽管能遵循复杂指令，但在某些领域问题解决能力有限。

limits.en: Not exempt from hallucinations and misinformation, requiring caution in critical applications.
limits.zh: 无法避免幻觉和错误信息，在关键应用中需谨慎使用。

items.en: Large multimodal models (LMM) have recently shown encouraging progress with visual instruction tuning. In this note, we show that the fully-connected vision-language cross-modal connector in LLaVA is surprisingly powerful and data-efficient. With simple modifications to LLaVA, namely, using CLIP-ViT-L-336px with an MLP projection and adding academic-task-oriented VQA data with simple response formatting prompts, we establish stronger baselines that achieve state-of-the-art across 11 benchmarks. Our final 13B checkpoint uses merely 1.2M publicly available data, and finishes full training in ∼similar-to\sim1 day on a single 8-A100 node. We hope this can make state-of-the-art LMM research more accessible. Code and model will be publicly available.
items.zh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）最近在视觉指令微调方面展现出令人鼓舞的进展。本文表明，LLaVA中的全连接视觉-语言跨模态连接器出人意料地强大且数据高效。通过对LLaVA进行简单修改，即使用带有MLP投影的CLIP-ViT-L-336px，并添加面向学术任务的VQA数据及简单的响应格式提示，我们建立了更强的基线，在11个基准测试中达到了最先进水平。我们的最终13B检查点仅使用120万公开数据，并在单个8-A100节点上约1天内完成全部训练。我们希望这能使最先进的LMM研究更加普及。代码和模型将公开。

items.en: Large multimodal models (LMMs) have become increasingly popular in the research community, as they are the key building blocks towards general-purpose assistants [22, 35, 1]. Recent studies on LMMs are converging on a central concept known as visual instruction tuning [28]. The results are promising, e.g. LLaVA [28] and MiniGPT-4 [49] demonstrate impressive results on natural instruction-following and visual reasoning capabilities. To better understand the capability of LMMs, multiple benchmarks [29, 43, 20, 26, 11] have been proposed. Recent works further demonstrate improved performance by scaling up the pretraining data [9, 2], instruction-following data [45, 46, 21, 9], visual encoders [2], or langauge models [31], respectively. The LLaVA architecture is also leveraged in different downstream tasks and domains, including region-level [6, 44] and pixel-level [19] understanding, biomedical assistants [23], image generation [3], adversarial studies [4, 47].
items.zh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）在研究界越来越受欢迎，因为它们是迈向通用助手的关键构建模块[22, 35, 1]。近期关于LMM的研究正汇聚于一个核心概念——视觉指令微调[28]。结果令人鼓舞，例如LLaVA[28]和MiniGPT-4[49]在自然指令遵循和视觉推理能力上展示了令人印象深刻的结果。为了更好地理解LMM的能力，多个基准测试[29, 43, 20, 26, 11]被提出。近期工作进一步通过分别扩展预训练数据[9, 2]、指令遵循数据[45, 46, 21, 9]、视觉编码器[2]或语言模型[31]来提升性能。LLaVA架构也被用于不同的下游任务和领域，包括区域级[6, 44]和像素级[19]理解、生物医学助手[23]、图像生成[3]以及对抗性研究[4, 47]。

items.capEn: Figure 1: LLaVA-1.5 achieves SoTA on a broad range of 11 tasks (Top), with high training sample efficiency (Left) and simple modifications to LLaVA (Right): an MLP connector and including academic-task-oriented data with response formatting prompts.
items.capZh: 图1：LLaVA-1.5在广泛的11项任务中达到最先进水平（顶部），具有高训练样本效率（左侧）和对LLaVA的简单修改（右侧）：MLP连接器和包含带有响应格式提示的学术任务导向数据。

items.en: This note establishes stronger and more feasible baselines built upon the LLaVA framework. We report that two simple improvements, namely, an MLP cross-modal connector and incorporating academic task related data such as VQA, are orthogonal to the framework of LLaVA, and when used with LLaVA, lead to better multimodal understanding capabilities. In contrast to InstructBLIP [9] or Qwen-VL [2], which trains specially designed visual resamplers on hundreds of millions or even billions of image-text paired data, LLaVA uses the simplest architecture design for LMMs and requires only training a simple fully-connected projection layer on merely 600K image-text pairs. Our final model can finish training in ∼similar-to\sim1 day on a single 8-A100 machine and achieves state-of-the-art results on a wide range of benchmarks. Moreover, unlike Qwen-VL [2] that includes in-house data in training, LLaVA utilizes only publicly available data. We hope these improved and easily-reproducible baselines will provide a reference for future research in open-source LMM.
items.zh: 本文建立了基于LLaVA框架的更强大且更可行的基线。我们报告了两个简单改进，即MLP跨模态连接器和整合学术任务相关数据（如VQA），这些改进与LLaVA框架正交，并与LLaVA结合使用时，能带来更好的多模态理解能力。与InstructBLIP[9]或Qwen-VL[2]（它们在数亿甚至数十亿的图像-文本配对数据上训练专门设计的视觉重采样器）不同，LLaVA使用最简单的LMM架构设计，仅需在60万图像-文本对上训练一个简单的全连接投影层。我们的最终模型可以在单个8-A100机器上约1天内完成训练，并在广泛的基准测试中达到最先进结果。此外，与Qwen-VL[2]（在训练中包含内部数据）不同，LLaVA仅使用公开数据。我们希望这些改进且易于复现的基线能为开源LMM的未来研究提供参考。

full.secZh: 指令跟随型大语言模型

items.en: Common architectures include a pre-trained visual backbone to encode visual features, a pre-trained large language model (LLM) to comprehend the user instructions and produce responses, and a vision-language cross-modal connector to align the vision encoder outputs to the language models. As shown in Fig. 1, LLaVA [28] is perhaps the simplest architecture for LMMs. Optionally, visual resamplers (e.g. Qformer [24]) are used to reduce the number of visual patches [49, 9, 2]. Training an instruction-following LMM usually follows a two-stage protocol. First, the vision-language alignment pretraining stage leverages image-text pairs to align the visual features with the language model’s word embedding space. Earlier works utilize relatively few image-text pairs (e.g. ∼similar-to\sim600K [28] or ∼similar-to\sim6M [49]), while some recent works pretrain the vision-language connector for a specific language model on a large amount of image-text pairs (e.g. 129M [9] and 1.4B [2]), to maximize the LMM’s performance. Second, the visual instruction tuning stage tunes the model on visual instructions, to enable the model to follow users’ diverse requests on instructions that involve the visual contents.
items.zh: 常见架构包括：预训练的视觉骨干网络用于编码视觉特征，预训练的大型语言模型（LLM）用于理解用户指令并生成响应，以及视觉-语言跨模态连接器用于对齐视觉编码器输出与语言模型。如图1所示，LLaVA[28]可能是LMM最简单的架构。可选地，视觉重采样器（如Qformer[24]）用于减少视觉补丁数量[49, 9, 2]。训练指令遵循LMM通常遵循两阶段协议。首先，视觉-语言对齐预训练阶段利用图像-文本对将视觉特征与语言模型的词嵌入空间对齐。早期工作使用相对较少的图像-文本对（例如约60万[28]或约600万[49]），而近期一些工作针对特定语言模型在大量图像-文本对上预训练视觉-语言连接器（例如1.29亿[9]和14亿[2]），以最大化LMM的性能。其次，视觉指令微调阶段在视觉指令上微调模型，使模型能够遵循用户涉及视觉内容的多样化指令请求。

items.en: In NLP, studies show that the quality of instruction-following data largely affects the capability of the resulting instruction-following models [48]. For visual instruction tuning, LLaVA [28] is the pioneer to leverage text-only GPT-4 to expand the existing COCO [27] bounding box and caption dataset to a multimodal instruction-following dataset that contains three types of instruction-following data: conversational-style QA, detailed description, and complex reasoning. LLaVA’s pipeline has been employed to expand to textual understanding [45], million-scales [46], and region-level conversations [6]. InstructBLIP [9] incorporates academic-task-oriented VQA datasets to further enhance the model’s visual capabilities. Conversely, [5] identifies that such naive data merging can result in the models that tend to overfit to VQA datasets and thus are inability to participate in natural conversations. The authors further proposes to leverage the LLaVA pipeline to convert VQA datasets to a conversational style. While this proves effective for training, it introduces added complexities in data scaling.
items.zh: 在自然语言处理中，研究表明指令遵循数据的质量在很大程度上影响最终指令遵循模型的能力[48]。对于视觉指令微调，LLaVA[28]是首个利用纯文本GPT-4将现有COCO[27]边界框和字幕数据集扩展为多模态指令遵循数据集的工作，该数据集包含三种类型的指令遵循数据：对话式问答、详细描述和复杂推理。LLaVA的流程已被用于扩展到文本理解[45]、百万级规模[46]和区域级对话[6]。InstructBLIP[9]整合了面向学术任务的VQA数据集，以进一步增强模型的视觉能力。相反，[5]指出这种简单的数据合并可能导致模型过度拟合VQA数据集，从而无法参与自然对话。作者进一步提出利用LLaVA流程将VQA数据集转换为对话风格。虽然这对训练有效，但引入了数据扩展的额外复杂性。

items.en: As the initial work of visual instruction tuning, LLaVA has showcased commendable proficiency in visual reasoning capabilities, surpassing even more recent models on diverse benchmarks for real-life visual instruction-following tasks, while only falling short on academic benchmarks that typically require short-form answers (e.g. single-word). The latter was attributed to the fact that LLaVA has not been pretrained on large-scale data, as other approaches do. In this note, we first study the scaling effect of data, models and input image resolution on a selection of three datasets in Table 1, and then compare the final model against existing LMMs on a diverse set of 12 benchmarks in Table 2. We show that the LLaVA’s architecture is powerful and data-efficient for visual instruction tuning, and achieves the best performance using significantly less compute and training data than all other methods.
items.zh: 作为视觉指令微调的初始工作，LLaVA在视觉推理能力上展示了值得称赞的熟练度，在真实生活视觉指令遵循任务的多样化基准测试中甚至超越了更近期的模型，仅在通常需要短形式答案（例如单个词）的学术基准测试上表现不足。后者归因于LLaVA没有像其他方法那样在大规模数据上预训练。在本文中，我们首先在表1的三个数据集上研究数据、模型和输入图像分辨率的缩放效应，然后在表2的12个多样化基准测试上将最终模型与现有LMM进行比较。我们表明，LLaVA的架构对于视觉指令微调是强大且数据高效的，并且在使用显著更少的算力和训练数据的情况下达到了最佳性能。

items.en: We find that the inability [5] to balance between short- and long-form VQA for approaches like InstructBLIP [9] is mainly due to the following reasons. First, ambiguous prompts on the response format. For example, Q: {Question} A: {Answer}. Such prompts do not clearly indicate the desirable output format, and can overfit an LLM behavorially to short-form answers even for natural visual conversations. Second, not finetuning the LLM. The first issue is worsened by InstructBLIP only finetuning the Qformer for instruction-tuning. It requires the Qformer’s visual output tokens to control the length of the LLM’s output to be either long-form or short-form, as in prefix tuning [25], but Qformer may lack the capability of properly doing so, due to its limited capacity compared with LLMs like LLaMA. See Table 6 for a qualitative example.
items.zh: 我们发现[5]中提到的InstructBLIP[9]等方法在短形式和长形式VQA之间无法平衡，主要归因于以下原因。首先，响应格式的提示模糊。例如，Q: {Question} A: {Answer}。这样的提示没有明确指示期望的输出格式，可能导致LLM在行为上过度拟合短形式答案，即使对于自然视觉对话也是如此。其次，没有微调LLM。第一个问题因InstructBLIP仅微调Qformer进行指令微调而加剧。它要求Qformer的视觉输出令牌控制LLM输出的长度，使其为长形式或短形式，如同前缀微调[25]，但Qformer可能缺乏适当执行此操作的能力，因为与LLaMA等LLM相比其容量有限。表6提供了一个定性示例。

items.en: To address this, we propose to use a single response formatting prompt that clearly indicates the output format, to be appended at the end of VQA questions when promoting short answers: Answer the question using a single word or phrase. We empirically show that when LLM is finetuned with such prompts, LLaVA is able to properly adjust the output format according to the user’s instructions, and does not require additional processing of the VQA data using ChatGPT [5], which further enables scaling to various data sources. As shown in Table 1, by merely including VQAv2 [12] in training, LLaVA’s performance on MME significantly improves (1323.8 vs 502.8) and outperforms InstructBLIP by 111 points.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用一个单一的响应格式提示，明确指示输出格式，在促进短答案时附加在VQA问题末尾：用单个词或短语回答问题。我们经验性地表明，当LLM使用此类提示进行微调时，LLaVA能够根据用户指令适当调整输出格式，并且不需要使用ChatGPT[5]对VQA数据进行额外处理，这进一步使得扩展到各种数据源成为可能。如表1所示，仅通过在训练中包含VQAv2[12]，LLaVA在MME上的性能显著提升（1323.8 vs 502.8），并超过InstructBLIP 111分。

items.en: Inspired by the improved performance in self-supervised learning by changing from a linear projection to an MLP [7, 8], we find that improving the vision-language connector’s representation power with a two-layer MLP can improve LLaVA’s multimodal capabilities, compared with the original linear projection design.
items.zh: 受自监督学习中从线性投影改为MLP[7, 8]带来性能提升的启发，我们发现与原始线性投影设计相比，使用两层MLP提高视觉-语言连接器的表示能力可以增强LLaVA的多模态能力。

items.en: We further include additional academic-task-oriented VQA datasets for VQA, OCR, and region-level perception, to enhance the model’s capabilities in various ways, as shown in Table 1. We first include four additional datasets that are used in InstructBLIP: open-knowledge VQA (OKVQA [33], A-OKVQA [37]) and OCR (OCRVQA [34], TextCaps [39]). A-OKVQA is converted to multiple choice questions and a specific response formatting prompt is used: Answer with the option’s letter from the given choices directly. With only a subset of the datasets InstructBLIP uses, LLaVA already surpasses it on all three tasks in Table 1, suggesting LLaVA’s effective design. Furthermore, we find further adding region-level VQA datasets (Visual Genome [18], RefCOCO [17, 32]) improves the model’s capability of localizing fine-grained visual details.
items.zh: 我们进一步包含额外的面向学术任务的VQA数据集，用于VQA、OCR和区域级感知，以多种方式增强模型的能力，如表1所示。我们首先包含InstructBLIP中使用的四个额外数据集：开放知识VQA（OKVQA[33]、A-OKVQA[37]）和OCR（OCRVQA[34]、TextCaps[39]）。A-OKVQA被转换为多项选择题，并使用特定的响应格式提示：直接用给定选项的字母回答。仅使用InstructBLIP所用数据集的一个子集，LLaVA在表1的所有三个任务上已经超越了它，这表明了LLaVA的有效设计。此外，我们发现进一步添加区域级VQA数据集（Visual Genome[18]、RefCOCO[17, 32]）提高了模型定位细粒度视觉细节的能力。

items.en: We further scale up the input image resolution to allow LLM to clearly “see” the details of images, and add the GQA dataset as an additional visual knowledge source. We also incorporate ShareGPT [38] data and scale up the LLM to 13B as in [2, 31, 6]. Results on MM-Vet shows the most significant improvement when scaling the LLM to 13B, suggesting the importance of the base LLM’s capability for visual conversations. We denote the final model with all the modifications as LLaVA-1.5 (the last two rows in Table 1), which achieves an impressive performance that significantly outperforms the original LLaVA [28].
items.zh: 我们进一步扩大输入图像分辨率，使LLM能够清晰地“看到”图像细节，并添加GQA数据集作为额外的视觉知识源。我们还整合了ShareGPT[38]数据，并将LLM扩展到13B，如[2, 31, 6]所示。MM-Vet上的结果显示，当LLM扩展到13B时改进最为显著，这表明基础LLM的能力对于视觉对话的重要性。我们将包含所有修改的最终模型记为LLaVA-1.5（表1的最后两行），它取得了令人印象深刻的性能，显著优于原始LLaVA[28]。

items.en: We benchmark LLaVA-1.5 on a wide range of academic VQA benchmarks and recent benchmarks specifically proposed for instruction-following LMMs, totalling 12 benchmarks. We show that it achieves the best performance across 11 out of 12 benchmarks, despite using magnitudes smaller pretraining and instruction tuning data compared with other methods [9, 2]. It is encouraging that LLaVA-1.5 achieves the best performance with the simplest architecture, academic compute and public datasets, and yields a fully-reproducible and affordable baseline for future research. The results also suggest that visual instruction tuning plays a more important role in improving an LMM’s capabilities than pretraining, and raises questions upon the common belief that LMMs require significant amount of vision-language alignment pretraining [9, 24, 2], despite that the vision encoders (e.g. CLIP [36], OpenCLIP [16], EVA-CLIP [10], etc.) are already pretrained on web-scale image-text paired dataset. LLaVA-1.5 (even the 7B model) outperforms 80B IDEFICS [15], a Flamingo-like LMM with billions of trainable parameters for cross-modal connection. This also makes us rethink the benefits of the vision samplers and the necessity of the additional large-scale pretraining, in terms of multimodal instruction-following capabilities.
items.zh: 我们在广泛的学术VQA基准测试和近期专门为指令遵循LMM提出的基准测试上对LLaVA-1.5进行了评估，共计12个基准测试。我们表明，尽管与其他方法[9, 2]相比使用的预训练和指令微调数据量级更小，它在12个基准测试中的11个上取得了最佳性能。令人鼓舞的是，LLaVA-1.5以最简单的架构、学术级别的算力和公开数据集取得了最佳性能，为未来研究提供了一个完全可复现且负担得起的基线。结果还表明，视觉指令微调在提升LMM能力方面比预训练扮演着更重要的角色，并对LMM需要大量视觉-语言对齐预训练[9, 24, 2]的普遍观点提出了质疑，尽管视觉编码器（如CLIP[36]、OpenCLIP[16]、EVA-CLIP[10]等）已经在网络规模的图像-文本配对数据集上预训练。LLaVA-1.5（即使是7B模型）也优于80B的IDEFICS[15]，一种具有数十亿可训练参数用于跨模态连接的Flamingo类LMM。这也让我们重新思考视觉采样器的优势以及额外大规模预训练的必要性，在多模态指令遵循能力方面。

items.en: Although LLaVA-1.5 is only trained with a limited number of format instructions, it generalizes to others. First, VizWiz [13] requires the model to output “Unanswerable” when the provided content is insufficient to answer the question, and our response format prompt (Table 8) effectively instructs the model to do so (11.1% →→\rightarrow 67.8% on unanswerable questions). We additionally present qualitative examples on instructing LLaVA-1.5 to verify the tricky questions (Fig. 3) and respond in a constrained JSON format (Fig. 4).
items.zh: 尽管LLaVA-1.5仅使用有限数量的格式指令进行训练，但它能泛化到其他格式。首先，VizWiz[13]要求模型在提供的内容不足以回答问题时输出“Unanswerable”，我们的响应格式提示（表8）有效地指示模型这样做（不可回答问题上从11.1%提升到67.8%）。我们还提供了定性示例，展示如何指示LLaVA-1.5验证棘手问题（图3）并以受限的JSON格式响应（图4）。

items.capEn: Table 3: LLaVA-1.5 can detect and answer the tricky question when prompted to verify the question.
items.capZh: 表3：LLaVA-1.5能够在提示验证问题时检测并回答棘手问题。

items.en: Though LLaVA-1.5 is not finetuned for multilingual multimodal instruction following at all, we find that it is capable of following multilingual instructions, partly due to the multilingual language instructions in ShareGPT [38]. We quantitatively evaluate the model’s generalization capability to Chinese on MMBench-CN [29], where the questions of MMBench are converted to Chinese. Notably, LLaVA-1.5 outperforms Qwen-VL-Chat by 7.3% (63.6% vs 56.7%), despite Qwen being finetuned on Chinese multimodal instructions while LLaVA-1.5 is not.
items.zh: 尽管LLaVA-1.5完全没有针对多语言多模态指令遵循进行微调，我们发现它能够遵循多语言指令，部分归因于ShareGPT[38]中的多语言指令。我们在MMBench-CN[29]上定量评估了模型对中文的泛化能力，其中MMBench的问题被转换为中文。值得注意的是，LLaVA-1.5比Qwen-VL-Chat高出7.3%（63.6% vs 56.7%），尽管Qwen在中文多模态指令上进行了微调，而LLaVA-1.5没有。

items.en: For LLaVA-1.5, we use the same pretraining dataset of LCS-558K111LCS-558K: a subset of ∼similar-to\sim558K image-text pairs from LAION-CC-SBU with BLIP captions, as used in LLaVA-Lightning series., and keep the training iterations and batch size roughly the same for instruction tuning as LLaVA [28]. Due to the increased image input resolution to 336px, the training of LLaVA-1.5 is ∼similar-to\sim2×\times as long as LLaVA: ∼similar-to\sim6 hours of pretraining and ∼similar-to\sim20 hours of visual instruction tuning, using 8×\times A100s.
items.zh: 对于LLaVA-1.5，我们使用与LLaVA-Lightning系列相同的LCS-558K¹预训练数据集（来自LAION-CC-SBU的约55.8万图像-文本对，带有BLIP字幕），并保持指令微调的训练迭代次数和批次大小与LLaVA[28]大致相同。由于图像输入分辨率增加到336px，LLaVA-1.5的训练时间约为LLaVA的两倍：使用8×A100，预训练约6小时，视觉指令微调约20小时。

items.en: Despite the promising results demonstrated by LLaVA-1.5, several limitations must be acknowledged. First, LLaVA utilizes full image patches, potentially prolonging each training iteration. While visual resamplers [24, 9, 2] reduce the number of visual patches in LLMs, they currently cannot achieve convergence as efficiently as LLaVA with a comparable amount of training data, probably due to more trainable parameters in the resamplers. The development of a sample-efficient visual resampler could pave the way for future scaling-up of instruction-following multimodal models. Second, LLaVA-1.5 is not yet capable of processing multiple images due to the lack of such instruction-following data, and the limit of the context length. Third, although LLaVA-1.5 exhibits proficiency in following complex instructions, its problem-solving capabilities can still be limited in certain domains, which could be improved with a more capable language model and with high-quality, targeted visual instruction tuning data. Finally, despite its significantly reduced propensity for hallucination, LLaVA is not exempt from producing hallucinations and occasionally disseminating misinformation, and should be used with caution in critical applications (e.g. medical).
items.zh: 尽管LLaVA-1.5展示了令人鼓舞的结果，但必须承认几个局限性。首先，LLaVA使用完整的图像补丁，可能延长每次训练迭代的时间。虽然视觉重采样器[24, 9, 2]减少了LLM中的视觉补丁数量，但它们目前无法像LLaVA那样在相当数量的训练数据下高效收敛，可能是由于重采样器中更多的可训练参数。开发样本高效的视觉重采样器可以为未来指令遵循多模态模型的扩展铺平道路。其次，由于缺乏此类指令遵循数据以及上下文长度的限制，LLaVA-1.5尚不能处理多张图像。第三，尽管LLaVA-1.5在遵循复杂指令方面表现出色，但其问题解决能力在某些领域仍然有限，这可以通过更强大的语言模型以及高质量、有针对性的视觉指令微调数据来改进。最后，尽管其幻觉倾向显著降低，LLaVA仍无法避免产生幻觉并偶尔传播错误信息，在关键应用（如医疗）中应谨慎使用。

items.capEn: Table 4: LLaVA-1.5 can extract information from the image and answer following the required format, despite a few errors compared with GPT-4V. GPT-4V results are obtained from [42].
items.capZh: 表4：LLaVA-1.5能够从图像中提取信息并按照要求格式回答，尽管与GPT-4V相比存在一些错误。GPT-4V结果来自[42]。

items.en: This work was supported in part by NSF CAREER IIS2150012, and Institute of Information & communications Technology Planning & Evaluation(IITP) grants funded by the Korea government(MSIT) (No. 2022-0-00871, Development of AI Autonomy and Knowledge Enhancement for AI Agent Collaboration) and (No. RS-2022-00187238, Development of Large Korean Language Model Technology for Efficient Pre-training).
items.zh: 这项工作部分得到了NSF CAREER IIS2150012、韩国政府（MSIT）资助的信息与通信技术规划与评估研究所（IITP）拨款（No. 2022-0-00871，面向AI智能体协作的AI自主性和知识增强开发）以及（No. RS-2022-00187238，面向高效预训练的大型韩语语言模型技术开发）的支持。

items.en: Our final training data mixture contains a variety of datasets: VQA [12, 14, 33, 37], OCR [34, 39], region-level VQA [17, 32, 18], visual conversation [28] and language conversation [38] data. We adopt multiple strategies to reduce training cost and enhance efficiency, detailed as follows:
items.zh: 我们最终的训练数据混合包含多种数据集：VQA [12, 14, 33, 37]、OCR [34, 39]、区域级VQA [17, 32, 18]、视觉对话 [28] 和语言对话 [38] 数据。我们采用多种策略来降低训练成本并提高效率，具体如下：

items.en: For all VQA datasets, QA pairs from the same training image are merged into a single conversation.
items.zh: 对于所有VQA数据集，同一训练图像中的问答对被合并为单个对话。

items.en: For ShareGPT [38], we filter out invalid conversations as [41]. Unlike Vicuna [41], long conversations that surpass 2048 tokens are truncated rather than splitting to multiple conversations. This results in ∼similar-to\sim40K conversations.
items.zh: 对于ShareGPT [38]，我们按照[41]的方法过滤掉无效对话。与Vicuna [41]不同，超过2048个token的长对话被截断而不是拆分为多个对话。这产生了约40K个对话。

items.en: Each QA pair in A-OKVQA [37] is augmented k𝑘k times, where k𝑘k is the number of choices per question, to counterbalance the lack of multiple-choice data.
items.zh: A-OKVQA [37]中的每个问答对被增强k次，其中k是每个问题的选项数，以平衡多选题数据的不足。

items.en: 80K conversations are sampled from OCRVQA [34].
items.zh: 从OCRVQA [34]中采样了80K个对话。

items.en: For Visual Genome, we sample 10 annotations for images with additional annotations.
items.zh: 对于Visual Genome，我们为具有额外标注的图像采样10个标注。

items.en: For RefCOCO, conversations are dissected into segments, each containing fewer than 10 conversations.
items.zh: 对于RefCOCO，对话被分割成片段，每个片段包含少于10个对话。

items.en: We obverse that language conversations are often longer than visual ones. For each batch, we sample conversations only from a single modality, and this speeds up the training by 25%, and does not affect the final outcome.
items.zh: 我们观察到语言对话通常比视觉对话更长。对于每个批次，我们仅从单一模态采样对话，这使训练速度提高了25%，且不影响最终结果。

items.en: All data splits are concatenated together and sampled with the same probability. We present the response formatting prompts of the final instruction-following data mixtures in Table 7 and the response format prompts used for each evaluation benchmark in Table 8.
items.zh: 所有数据分割被连接在一起并以相同概率采样。我们在表7中展示了最终指令跟随数据混合的响应格式提示，在表8中展示了每个评估基准使用的响应格式提示。

items.en: LLaVA-1.5 use the same set of hyperparameters as the original LLaVA, except that we halve the learning rate in pretraining due to the usage of the MLP projection layer instead of the original linear projection layer design. We show the training hyperparameters for both first-stage vision-language alignment pretraining and the second-stage visual instruction tuning in Table 5.
items.zh: LLaVA-1.5使用与原始LLaVA相同的超参数集，除了在预训练中将学习率减半，因为我们使用了MLP投影层而不是原始的线性投影层设计。我们在表5中展示了第一阶段视觉-语言对齐预训练和第二阶段视觉指令微调的训练超参数。

items.capEn: Table 6: Comparison of how different prompt regularizes the output format. The results are obtained zero-shot directly after LLaVA undergoes the first-stage vision-language alignment pretraining, without any visual instruction tuning.
items.capZh: 表6：不同提示如何规范输出格式的比较。结果是在LLaVA经过第一阶段视觉-语言对齐预训练后直接零样本获得的，未进行任何视觉指令微调。
